subject: Upgrade Your Plan for More Value, Priya!
body:
Hi Priya,

We hope you’re enjoying your Motorola Moto G and your current plan. We noticed that you’re using around 5GB of data each month, and we have a fantastic upgrade opportunity tailored just for you!

Introducing our **Essential 20GB** plan for just £18 a month. This plan offers:
- **20GB of 4G/5G data** – perfect for browsing, social media, and streaming your favourite shows.
- **Unlimited calls and texts** – stay connected without worrying about extra charges.
- **3GB EU roaming included** – travel with ease and stay connected while abroad.

This upgrade provides great value for your everyday use, ensuring you have plenty of data to enjoy all your online activities.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to enhance your experience! Click the link below to upgrade your plan today:
[Upgrade Now](#)

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
